<!-- @auto-generated: citation_block -->
## How to cite NeqSim

If you use results produced with NeqSim in a publication, please cite
the software as follows:

> Solbraa, Even; NeqSim contributors. **NeqSim: A library for thermodynamic and process simulation** (v3.7.0). 2026. <https://github.com/equinor/neqsim>.

```bibtex
@software{neqsim370,
  author  = {Solbraa, Even; NeqSim contributors},
  title   = {{NeqSim: A library for thermodynamic and process simulation}},
  version = {3.7.0},
  year    = {2026},
  url     = {https://github.com/equinor/neqsim},
}
```
